_index_meta.purpose: LLM navigation aid for FRL_Instructions.json (OpenAPI 3.0.1, ~17 000 lines). Read this index first. Use it to locate the specific path and schema definitions you need in the full spec, then fetch only those sections.
_index_meta.auth: None required for public read operations. POST /v1/Sessions to obtain an authToken for write/user operations.
_index_meta.odata: All list endpoints support standard OData query parameters: $filter, $select, $expand, $orderby, $top, $skip, $count.
_index_meta.duplication_warning: Every endpoint appears 2–3 times in the full spec under different casing conventions (e.g. /v1/titles, /v1/Titles, /v1/Titles/Default.Search). These are functionally identical. Prefer the lowercase or PascalCase-without-Default variant. Do not process duplicate entries.
_index_meta.schema_noise_warning: 153 schemas are defined in components/schemas. Only 30 are FRL domain objects. The remaining 123 are ASP.NET/OData framework internals (System.*, Microsoft.*, Frl.Domain.*) — ignore them unless debugging framework behaviour.

search_for_legislation.description: Find titles (Acts, instruments) by keyword, series, status, or date.

get_title_by_id.description: Retrieve a single title (legislation entry) by its unique identifier.

list_all_titles.description: Page through all titles with optional OData filtering.

get_version_of_title.description: Retrieve a specific compiled version of a title at a point in time, by compilation number, or by registerId.

list_versions_of_title.description: List all registered versions (compilations) of a title.
list_versions_of_title.odata_filter_hint: Use $filter=titleId eq 'C2004A01224' to scope to one title.

download_document.description: Download the actual PDF, Word, or EPUB file for a version of a title.
download_document.note_on_response: Default response is binary (application/octet-stream). Add Accept: application/json header to get document metadata instead of file bytes.
key_params: type — enum: Primary | ES | SupportingMaterial | IncorporatedByReference | SupplementaryES
format — enum: Word | Pdf | Epub | NameOnly
rectificationVersionNumber — integer, 0 if not a rectification

get_document_metadata.description: Retrieve metadata about a document without downloading the file.
get_document_metadata.note: Same find() endpoints as download_document but with Accept: application/json header return Document metadata.

download_epub_file_within_document.description: Retrieve a specific file from inside an EPUB document.
key_params: All document find params, plus residualPath — relative path within the EPUB zip

get_content_by_key.description: Download a content document using its direct content key (used for inline HTML/XML renditions).

list_departments.description: Retrieve the list of Australian Government departments that administer legislation.

search_affects.description: Find amendments, repeals, and other affects between titles.
search_affects.note: Affect data is embedded in Version.reasons. Use the _AffectsSearch search context for targeted queries.

search_full_text.description: Search within the text of legislation.
search_full_text.note: Pass FullTextVersionSearch criteria. Returns ranked results with relevance scores.

search_point_in_time.description: Find which version of a title was in force at a specific date.

disallowance_queries.description: Check disallowance status and open disallowance periods for instruments.

sunset_date_queries.description: Find instruments with upcoming or past sunset dates.

text_applies.description: Retrieve TextApplies values — records of which provisions of one instrument apply to another.

print_order.description: Create a print order for physical copies of legislation.

user_management.description: Create accounts, manage passwords, save searches. Requires authentication.

submit_feedback.description: Submit public feedback about the legislation register.

Title.description: A law's official entry on the register — its name, series info, status, and pointers to its versions.

Version.description: A compiled snapshot of a Title at a point in time (e.g. Compilation No. 3).

Document.description: A physical file (PDF, Word, EPUB) associated with a version of a title.

Affect.description: Describes how one title affects another (amends, repeals, commences, etc.).

Department.description: An Australian Government department that administers legislation.

TextApplies.description: Records which provisions of one instrument apply as if part of another.

User.description: A registered user of the legislation.gov.au portal.

ParliamentaryScrutinyEvent.description: A disallowance motion or other scrutiny event in Parliament.

ReasonForVersion.description: Explains why a new version of a title was compiled — links to the affecting title.

SearchContexts.description: Identifies which search context(s) a title appears in (full text, affects, disallowance, etc.).

NameHistory.description: Previous names of a title and when each name changed.

StatusHistory.description: History of a title's status changes (e.g. when it was repealed).

PrintOrderRequest.description: Input for requesting physical printed copies.

domain_schemas.AffectSearch: Search criteria for filtering affect relationships.
domain_schemas.AffectedByTitle: A title affected by another, with series metadata.
domain_schemas.FutureSunsetDateSearch: Search result for upcoming sunset dates.
domain_schemas.OpenForDisallowanceSearch: Search result for instruments currently open for disallowance.
domain_schemas.FullTextVersionSearch: Search result for full-text version searches with relevance.
domain_schemas.TextSearch: Full-text search result with relevance and date context.
domain_schemas.SavedSearch: A named saved search stored against a user account.
domain_schemas.DateChanged: A from/to date pair recording when a value changed.
domain_schemas.DocumentPrint: A document with its print price per copy.
domain_schemas.DocumentKey: The composite key uniquely identifying a document.

common_identifier_patterns.titleId: Series identifier, e.g. C2004A01224 (Acts) or F2021L00100 (instruments). Present on Title, Version, Document.
common_identifier_patterns.registerId: Register identifier for a specific compiled version, e.g. F2021C00286. Unique to a Version.
common_identifier_patterns.compilationNumber: Incrementing string ('0', '1', '2' ...) for compilations of a title. '0' = as-made.
common_identifier_patterns.asAt: Date string yyyy-mm-dd. Selects the version in force on that date.
common_identifier_patterns.asAtSpecification: Enum shorthand for common as-at points: Latest | AsMade | InForce | Repealed | ...
common_identifier_patterns.documentType: Primary | ES (Explanatory Statement) | SupportingMaterial | IncorporatedByReference | SupplementaryES

endpoint_groups_in_full_spec.note: Each group below corresponds to a tag in FRL_Instructions.json. Path entries appear 2–3 times each; read only the first occurrence you find for a given normalised path.
endpoint_groups_in_full_spec.Departments: 3 entries — GET list, GET list (PascalCase), GET $count
endpoint_groups_in_full_spec.Documents: ~48 entries — list, get-by-key, find() variants by asAt/compilationNumber/registerId, EPUB internals, CreatePrintOrder
endpoint_groups_in_full_spec.TextApplies: 3 entries — GET list, GET list (PascalCase), GET $count
endpoint_groups_in_full_spec.Users: ~30 entries — CRUD, password management, saved searches
